## Details

This architecture represents an LLM-as-a-Controller paradigm where a central orchestration layer coordinates between deep static analysis and agentic reasoning. The system follows a pipeline where the Environment & Project Discovery layer prepares the workspace, the Static Analysis & Graph Engine extracts structural semantics, and the Agentic Reasoning & Abstraction layer transforms raw data into architectural insights. These insights are then validated by the Quality & Telemetry layer before being persisted and rendered by the Persistence & Documentation layer, ensuring a high-fidelity, incremental documentation workflow.

### Orchestration & CLI Controller [[Expand]](./Orchestration_CLI_Controller.md)
Acts as the system entry point, managing the execution lifecycle, CLI command parsing, and the high-level coordination of the analysis pipeline.

- `codeboarding_cli.commands.full_analysis.run_from_args`:69-75

### Environment & Project Discovery [[Expand]](./Environment_Project_Discovery.md)
Handles pre-flight operations, including environment setup (LSP servers, Node.js), project scanning to identify languages, and plugin registry management.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.scanner.ProjectScanner`:14-106
- `tool_registry.installers.install_tools`:515-537
- `core.registry.Registry`:12-46

### Static Analysis & Graph Engine [[Expand]](./Static_Analysis_Graph_Engine.md)
The core technical engine that manages LSP clients to perform symbol discovery, builds call graphs, and applies community detection (Leiden) to identify logical components.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.engine.lsp_client.LSPClient`:31-820
- `static_analyzer.engine.call_graph_builder.CallGraphBuilder`:23-302
- `static_analyzer.leiden_utils.find_partition`:37-63
- `static_analyzer.cluster_relations.build_component_relations`:42-83

### Agentic Reasoning & Abstraction [[Expand]](./Agentic_Reasoning_Abstraction.md)
The intelligence layer that uses LLMs to summarize code, generate architectural abstractions, and manage context budgets for large-scale repositories.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.agent.CodeBoardingAgent`:35-428
- `agents.abstraction_agent.AbstractionAgent`:38-177
- `agents.cluster_budget.ClusterPromptBudget`:10-21

### Quality & Telemetry [[Expand]](./Quality_Telemetry.md)
Monitors system health, calculates code quality metrics (like coupling and cohesion), and tracks execution telemetry for observability.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `health.runner.run_health_checks`:193-242
- `telemetry.service.ProductTelemetry`:21-94
- `health.checks.coupling.collect_coupling_values`:15-32

### Persistence & Documentation [[Expand]](./Persistence_Documentation.md)
Manages the storage of analysis results, handles incremental updates via Git diffs, and renders final outputs into Markdown or Mermaid.js diagrams.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.analysis_cache.StaticAnalysisCache`:60-273
- `repo_utils.diff_parser.detect_changes`:32-56

```mermaid
graph LR
    Lifecycle_Controller_State_Manager["Lifecycle Controller & State Manager"]
    Context_Synthesis_Prompt_Factory["Context Synthesis & Prompt Factory"]
    Analysis_Execution_Engine["Analysis Execution Engine"]
    Static_Semantic_Data_Integrator["Static-Semantic Data Integrator"]
    Lifecycle_Controller_State_Manager -- "Triggers specific analysis phases and manages loop progression" --> Analysis_Execution_Engine
    Lifecycle_Controller_State_Manager -- "Requests enriched code metadata and relational graphs" --> Static_Semantic_Data_Integrator
    Analysis_Execution_Engine -- "Requests constructed prompt strings" --> Context_Synthesis_Prompt_Factory
    Static_Semantic_Data_Integrator -- "Provides structured code entities and relationship data" --> Context_Synthesis_Prompt_Factory
    Analysis_Execution_Engine -- "Returns validated structured insights to update state" --> Lifecycle_Controller_State_Manager
    Context_Synthesis_Prompt_Factory -- "calls" --> Analysis_Execution_Engine
    Context_Synthesis_Prompt_Factory -- "calls" --> Static_Semantic_Data_Integrator
```

[![CodeBoarding](https://img.shields.io/badge/Generated%20by-CodeBoarding-9cf?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding)[![Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Try%20our-Demo-blue?style=flat-square)](https://www.codeboarding.org/diagrams)[![Contact](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contact%20us%20-%20contact@codeboarding.org-lightgrey?style=flat-square)](mailto:contact@codeboarding.org)

## Details

Manages the high-level lifecycle and state transitions of the analysis process.

### Lifecycle Controller & State Manager
Acts as the central authority for the analysis workflow, managing the transition between different execution phases and maintaining the global state of the agentic process.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.agent.CodeBoardingAgent`:35-428

### Context Synthesis & Prompt Factory
Responsible for the "Prompt Engineering" layer, dynamically assembling complex system and task messages by injecting static analysis metadata into predefined templates for LLM consumption.

### Analysis Execution Engine
Executes the iterative "steps" of the analysis, handling the low-level communication with LLM providers and validating that the model's output conforms to the expected architectural schemas.

### Static-Semantic Data Integrator
A data-enrichment layer that bridges raw static analysis (LSP/AST data) with the agent's internal model, resolving code references and building the relational graph used for context.

## Details

The foundational execution layer that manages the lifecycle of LLM interactions, base agent behaviors, retry logic, and the toolkit for repository data interaction.

## Details

Implements the primary reasoning logic through specialized agents that perform hierarchical abstraction and detailed synthesis.

## Details

Provides runtime lookup and deduplication services for agents, ensuring that QNames are resolved to the correct nodes in the current analysis state.

### State Synchronization Engine
Maintains the agent's context during incremental analysis by identifying and refreshing scopes that need updates.

## Details

Bridges the technical graph engine and AI agents by transforming data into optimized formats.

### Unified Data Exchange Layer [[Expand]](./Unified_Data_Exchange_Layer.md)
Bridges the gap between the static analysis engine and the agentic layer by serializing graph data into a structured, hierarchical JSON format.

## Details

The intelligence layer that uses LLMs to summarize code, generate architectural abstractions, and manage context budgets for large-scale repositories.

### Agent Orchestration & Execution Core [[Expand]](./Agent_Orchestration_Execution_Core.md)
The foundational execution layer that manages the lifecycle of LLM interactions, base agent behaviors, retry logic, and the toolkit for repository data interaction.

### Architectural Reasoning Strategy [[Expand]](./Architectural_Reasoning_Strategy.md)
Implements specialized reasoning patterns like hierarchical abstraction and deep-dive analysis, utilizing a cache to optimize performance.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.abstraction_agent.AbstractionAgent`:38-177
- `agents.details_agent.DetailsAgent`:37-249
- `agents.incremental_agent.IncrementalAgent`:50-241
- `caching.details_cache.ClusterCache`:37-53

### Context & Model Management [[Expand]](./Context_Model_Management.md)
Resolves model capabilities and dynamically prunes input data to fit within calculated token budgets.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.llm_config.LLMConfig`:84-140
- `agents.cluster_budget.ClusterPromptBudget`:10-21
- `agents.model_capabilities.get_context_window`:30-44

### Prompt Engineering Factory [[Expand]](./Prompt_Engineering_Factory.md)
A polyglot prompt generation system that translates architectural intents into provider-agnostic model instructions.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.prompts.prompt_factory.PromptFactory`:49-99
- `agents.prompts.abstract_prompt_factory.AbstractPromptFactory`:10-67
- `agents.prompts.claude_prompts.ClaudePromptFactory`:395-447

### Static Analysis Data Provider [[Expand]](./Static_Analysis_Data_Provider.md)
Provides structured access to static analysis results, translating graph structures into formats consumable by LLM tools.

### [FAQ](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/GeneratedOnBoardings/tree/main?tab=readme-ov-file#faq)

```mermaid
graph LR
    Tool_to_Analysis_Bridge["Tool-to-Analysis Bridge"]
    Agentic_Controller_Orchestrator["Agentic Controller & Orchestrator"]
    Synthesis_Grounding_Engine["Synthesis & Grounding Engine"]
    Agentic_Controller_Orchestrator -- "dispatches tool calls to" --> Tool_to_Analysis_Bridge
    Tool_to_Analysis_Bridge -- "provides ground truth data to" --> Synthesis_Grounding_Engine
    Synthesis_Grounding_Engine -- "feeds validation feedback to" --> Agentic_Controller_Orchestrator
    Agentic_Controller_Orchestrator -- "calls" --> Synthesis_Grounding_Engine
```

## Details

Implements the LLM-as-a-Controller pattern by exposing static analysis capabilities as discrete tools and translating natural language intent into structured graph queries.

### Tool-to-Analysis Bridge
Exposes the static analysis engine's internal graph representations as discrete, executable tools for the LLM.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.tools.read_structure.CodeStructureTool`:14-49
- `agents.tools.read_cfg.GetCFGTool`:8-61
- `static_analyzer.graph.CallGraph.llm_str`:732-753

## Details

Manages the persistence of analysis results using SHA-based keys and model signatures to ensure cache integrity and portability.

## Details

Bridges the gap between the installed tools and the target codebase. It applies repository-level ignore rules (e.g., .gitignore) to configure how language adapters should filter and interact with the file system.

## Details

Translates static analysis outcomes into telemetry events, capturing performance metrics and domain-specific data.

Orchestrates the collection of high-level execution metrics for analysis runs, capturing duration, success states, and project scale.

## Details

The core processing unit that executes static analysis and LLM-driven reasoning to generate diagrams and architectural insights.

```mermaid
graph LR
    Execution_Controller["Execution Controller"]

    Execution_Controller -- "Queries for ChangeSet to determine analysis scope" --> Change_State_Manager
    Change_State_Manager -- "Provides filtered file lists and change types" --> Execution_Controller
    Execution_Controller -- "Dispatches raw analysis fragments for merging" --> Data_Reconciler

    click Execution_Controller href "https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboarding/Execution_Controller.md" "Details"
```

## Details

Acts as the control plane, managing execution flow between full repository scans and incremental updates.

### Execution Controller [[Expand]](./Execution_Controller.md)
The primary entry point and state machine for the analysis process, determining scan types and managing LSP session lifecycles.

## Details

Acts as the subsystem's entry point, responsible for initializing the analysis environment, loading static analysis results, and managing the lifecycle of the DiagramGenerator.

### Diagram Generation Orchestrator
The primary controller of the subsystem that initializes the generation process, manages the DiagramGenerator lifecycle, and coordinates the flow from raw analysis results to final visual output.

## Details

Provides a structured abstraction for persisting and retrieving analysis results, metadata, and generated diagrams.

The central orchestrator responsible for the high-level lifecycle of analysis data, providing the primary API to commit or retrieve the complete state of a repository's analysis.

## Details

Implements specialized reasoning patterns like hierarchical abstraction and deep-dive analysis, utilizing a cache to optimize performance.

## Details

Provides a persistence layer for the reasoning process, storing cluster groupings and final analysis results to skip redundant LLM processing.

### Persistence Engine
Manages the low-level lifecycle of the cache database, providing a thread-safe, schema-validated interface for SQLite.

## Details

## Details

Provides the semantic domain model for changes by mapping line-level diffs to specific code ranges and classifying the status of methods or classes.

## Details

Maps parsed CLI arguments into specific execution strategies, acting as a bridge between user input and internal analysis parameters.

### Analysis Strategy Selector
Acts as the primary entry point, branching the execution flow based on user flags and repository metadata to ensure the static analysis engine is correctly configured.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `codeboarding_cli.commands.full_analysis.run_from_args`:70-76

Manages incremental updates by comparing current filesystem states against stored artifacts to minimize processing time and LLM token usage.

```mermaid
graph LR

    Semantic_Refinement_Heuristics["Semantic Refinement & Heuristics"]
```

## Details

Applies mathematical clustering to the call graph to identify logical modules.

### Graph Partitioning Engine [[Expand]](./Graph_Partitioning_Engine.md)
Executes mathematical clustering algorithms on the call graph to identify initial logical boundaries and evaluates partitioning strategies using modularity scoring.

## Details

Handles the ingestion and application of user-specific settings, parsing configuration files and injecting values into the process environment.

### Configuration Persistence Manager
Handles the physical lifecycle of the configuration file on the user's filesystem, ensuring default templates exist and performing safe updates.

## Details

Core logic engine that calculates token budgets and uses a skip planner to prune CFG nodes when capacity is exceeded.

## Details

Resolves model capabilities and dynamically prunes input data to fit within calculated token budgets.

### Model & Provider Registry [[Expand]](./Model_Provider_Registry.md)
Acts as the configuration authority, resolving active LLM providers and initializing clients with validated credentials.

## Details

Transforms raw static analysis data and repository metadata into structured, LLM-readable prompts.

### Context Extraction Orchestrator
Acts as the primary interface for gathering repository metadata, coordinating specialized tools to extract control flow graphs, method invocations, and package relationships.

## Details

## Details

Orchestrates the transformation of raw text diffs into structured objects by parsing unified diff formats and extracting granular hunks of code changes.

### Change Orchestrator
Acts as the subsystem's facade and controller, managing the lifecycle of change detection operations and aggregating the final structured ChangeSet.

## Details

Handles pre-flight configuration by mapping inputs to system paths and initializing output directories.

### Workspace & Path Orchestrator
The primary entry point that maps relative project paths to absolute system locations and manages the physical lifecycle of output directories.


**Related Classes/Methods**: _None_


**Source Files:**

- [`diagram_analysis/io_utils.py`](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingdiagram_analysis/io_utils.py)

### Runtime Configuration Loader
Manages the bootstrapping of the execution environment, including loading .env files, validating API keys for LLM providers, and configuring the Python/uv runtime settings.


**Related Classes/Methods**: _None_


**Source Files:**

- [`diagram_analysis/io_utils.py`](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingdiagram_analysis/io_utils.py)
  - `diagram_analysis.io_utils._AnalysisFileStore.read_root` ([L101-L104](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingdiagram_analysis/io_utils.py#L101-L104)) - Method


### Analysis Context Initializer
Bridges the gap between the physical environment and the static analysis engine by identifying target languages and preparing the data structures for source code reference mapping.


**Related Classes/Methods**: _None_


**Source Files:**

## Details

Handles pre-flight operations, including environment setup (LSP servers, Node.js), project scanning to identify languages, and plugin registry management.

## Details

## Details

The primary entry point and state machine for the analysis process, determining scan types and managing LSP session lifecycles.

## Details

Tracks the internal state of the agentic workflow, specifically focusing on LLM token usage, tool execution latency, and resource consumption.

## Details

Maintains the cumulative state and lifecycle of a monitored session, providing context managers and aggregating raw data into a statistical model.

### Execution Lifecycle Controller
Manages the temporal boundaries and nesting of monitored sessions using context managers to track start/stop events and maintain a stack-based hierarchy.

## Details

Acts as the central authority for system extensibility, managing the registration, validation, and lookup of tools and plugins.

## Details

Acts as the low-level adapter for the Git binary, handling command execution, repository state verification, and the retrieval of raw file lists and diff streams.

### Git Command Executor
The low-level adapter responsible for constructing and executing Git subprocesses, ensuring deterministic output and consistent environment handling.

### [FAQ](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/GeneratedOnBoardings/tree/main?tab=readme-ov-file#faq)

```mermaid
graph LR
    Analysis_Orchestrator["Analysis Orchestrator"]
    Semantic_Resolver["Semantic Resolver"]
    Graph_Model_Transformer["Graph Model & Transformer"]
    Analysis_Orchestrator -- "provides symbol table and references to" --> Semantic_Resolver
    Semantic_Resolver -- "outputs validated edges to" --> Graph_Model_Transformer
    Analysis_Orchestrator -- "invokes result converter in" --> Graph_Model_Transformer
    Graph_Model_Transformer -- "queries symbol table within" --> Semantic_Resolver
    Semantic_Resolver -- "calls" --> Analysis_Orchestrator
    Graph_Model_Transformer -- "calls" --> Analysis_Orchestrator
    click Analysis_Orchestrator href "https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboarding/Analysis_Orchestrator.md" "Details"
    click Semantic_Resolver href "https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboarding/Semantic_Resolver.md" "Details"
    click Graph_Model_Transformer href "https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboarding/Graph_Model_Transformer.md" "Details"
```

## Details

Builds the global call graph by coordinating symbol discovery and resolving cross-file references.

```mermaid
graph LR

    Graph_Core_Lifecycle_Manager -- "calls" --> Schema_Normalization_Result_Converter
```

## Details

Manages the structural representation of the call graph and converts internal engine symbols into the public-facing schema.

### Schema Normalization & Result Converter
Acts as the entry point for the subsystem, translating heterogeneous outputs from various language analyzers into the standardized CodeBoarding schema.

## Details

Executes mathematical clustering algorithms on the call graph to identify initial logical boundaries and evaluates partitioning strategies using modularity scoring.

### Algorithm Execution Core
Provides the low-level mathematical implementation for community detection, handling graph object conversion and Leiden algorithm optimization.

## Details

## Details

Manages the persistent identity of the tool installation by resolving unique device identifiers and ensuring event continuity across sessions.

### Hardware Entropy Provider
Responsible for the low-level extraction of unique hardware signals from the host machine, such as disk serial numbers and system UUIDs, to create a stable device identity.

## Details

Interfaces with the host Git repository to identify modified files and specific line ranges, enabling targeted, incremental analysis.

## Details

Implements the Incremental Analysis pattern by comparing current repository snapshots against previous runs to identify components requiring re-analysis.

### Incremental Analysis Orchestrator
Acts as the central controller for the incremental workflow, determining execution paths and triggering delta calculations.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `diagram_analysis.diagram_generator.DiagramGenerator.generate_analysis_incremental`:547-688

## Details

Manages the persistence, reconciliation, and temporal evolution of partitions across analysis runs to maintain architectural stability using seeded clustering and delta tracking.

### Stability-Aware Partitioning Engine
Manages the core algorithmic logic for generating new architectural partitions while respecting previous states using seeded Leiden community detection.

## Details

Handles the Delta Stitching logic that allows the agent's mental model of the code to evolve over time by mapping new fragments to existing component IDs.

### Delta Stitching Engine
Handles the primary logic of merging new analysis results into the existing state using identity mapping to maintain component continuity.

## Details

Primary controller that evaluates environment state against the manifest and triggers installation workflows.

## Details

Orchestrates the lookup of cached analysis data by validating source code SHAs and AI model signatures.

## Details

Generates browser-based reports featuring dynamic relationship graphs using Cytoscape.js.

## Details

Handles technical communication with LLM providers and encapsulates retry logic for resilience.

## Details

Manages the high-level analysis session, coordinating between the protocol client and language-specific adapters to build a comprehensive model of the codebase.

## Details

Handles the installation, version tracking, and registry management of Language Server Protocol (LSP) binaries required for analysis.

### Tool Registry & Manifest Resolver
Acts as the configuration authority for the subsystem, parsing tool definitions, resolving version constraints, and maintaining a registry of supported LSP servers.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `tool_registry.manifest.resolve_config`:203-249

```mermaid
    Notification_Diagnostic_Processor -- "updates health status based on notifications" --> Protocol_State_Health_Monitor
    Request_Orchestrator_Navigation_API -- "uses diagnostic models to enrich data" --> Notification_Diagnostic_Processor
    Transport_Lifecycle_Manager -- "calls" --> Request_Orchestrator_Navigation_API
```

[![CodeBoarding](https://img.shields.io/badge/Generated%20by-CodeBoarding-9cf?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding)[![Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Try%20our-Demo-blue?style=flat-square)](https://www.codeboarding.org/diagrams)[![Contact](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contact%20us%20-%20contact@codeboarding.org-lightgrey?style=flat-square)](mailto:contact@codeboarding.org)

## Details

Handles the low-level JSON-RPC communication lifecycle with Language Server processes, managing asynchronous message reading/writing and server health.

### Transport & Lifecycle Manager
Manages the underlying OS process for the LSP server, handling the raw byte-level I/O and the JSON-RPC message framing.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.engine.lsp_client.LSPClient.start`:94-186

## Details

Provides a polymorphic abstraction layer that translates generic analysis requests into language-specific configurations, commands, and qualified name resolution logic.

### Abstract Adaptation Core
Defines the foundational contract and shared logic for all language-specific implementations, providing the base LanguageAdapter class.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.engine.language_adapter.LanguageAdapter`:22-368

## Details

Provides a polymorphic interface to integrate environment data and project metadata to generate execution commands for analysis workers.

### Abstract Adapter Framework
Defines the core contract and shared logic for all language-specific implementations, handling universal tasks like qualified name construction and file system traversal.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.engine.language_adapter.LanguageAdapter`:22-368

Manages the physical interaction with the repository, including filtering ignored files and configuring the environment variables required for LSP execution.

### Heavyweight Runtime Adapters
Specialized adapters for languages requiring complex pre-analysis steps, such as toolchain installation and project-level restoration (e.g., C#/.NET).

## Details

Provides specialized logic for ecosystem-specific setup, resolving SDK paths, calculating memory requirements, and generating CLI commands for analysis engines.

## Details

Specialized manager for bootstrapping local Node.js runtimes and npm environments for TypeScript-based LSP servers.

### Execution Environment Adapter
Configures the runtime state for child processes by modifying environment variables to ensure correct binary resolution.


**Related Classes/Methods**: _None_

```mermaid
graph LR
    Platform_Abstraction_Layer["Platform Abstraction Layer"]

    Runtime_Discovery_Compatibility_Engine -- "Supplies validated absolute paths of binaries to" --> Environment_Orchestrator
    Platform_Abstraction_Layer -- "Supplies platform flags to determine environment variable translations for" --> Environment_Orchestrator

    Environment_Orchestrator -- "calls" --> Runtime_Discovery_Compatibility_Engine
```

## Details

Centralizes filesystem logic for tool installation paths, version compatibility, and binary discovery.

### Platform Abstraction Layer
Provides the foundational OS-specific logic required to navigate different filesystems and handle path normalization for Windows, POSIX, and WSL environments.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `tool_registry.paths.exe_suffix`:29-31
- `tool_registry.paths.user_data_dir`:76-78
- `tool_registry.paths.get_servers_dir`:81-83

- [`tool_registry/paths.py`](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingtool_registry/paths.py)
  - `tool_registry.paths.embedded_node_path` ([L100-L104](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingtool_registry/paths.py#L100-L104)) - Function
  - `tool_registry.paths.embedded_npm_cli_path` ([L114-L117](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding/blob/main/.codeboardingtool_registry/paths.py#L114-L117)) - Function


### Runtime Discovery & Compatibility Engine
Implements the core logic for locating and validating Node.js and npm runtimes, including version probing and caching results.

[![CodeBoarding](https://img.shields.io/badge/Generated%20by-CodeBoarding-9cf?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/CodeBoarding)[![Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Try%20our-Demo-blue?style=flat-square)](https://www.codeboarding.org/diagrams)[![Contact](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contact%20us%20-%20contact@codeboarding.org-lightgrey?style=flat-square)](mailto:contact@codeboarding.org)

## Details

Manages the storage of analysis results, handles incremental updates via Git diffs, and renders final outputs into Markdown or Mermaid.js diagrams.

## Details

Manages physical storage, atomic writes, and serialization of cache files on disk.

### Atomic Storage Engine
Manages low-level physical persistence of analysis data using atomic write-then-swap patterns and file locking to ensure thread-safe, corruption-free cache updates.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.analysis_cache.StaticAnalysisCache.save`:216-273



**Source Files:**

Ensures cache portability by converting absolute system paths to repository-relative paths during serialization and restoring them during loading.


**Related Classes/Methods**: _None_

## Details

Handles the persistence and retrieval of analysis results using a fingerprinting mechanism to enable incremental analysis.

### Identity & Fingerprinting Engine
Generates a unique, deterministic signature for the analysis context by combining file-system state and model configurations.

## Details

Handles the transformation of file paths between absolute and relative formats to ensure cache portability across different environments.

## Details

Performs deep inspection of the target repository to identify programming languages, configuration files, and dependency structures while managing ignore-logic and repository hashing.

### Repository Traversal & Filtering [[Expand]](./Repository_Traversal_Filtering.md)
Manages the physical inspection of the file system, implements ignore logic, and generates repository state hashes for incremental analysis.

## Details

A polyglot prompt generation system that translates architectural intents into provider-agnostic model instructions.

### Prompt Orchestration & Interface [[Expand]](./Prompt_Orchestration_Interface.md)

### Provider-Specific Implementations [[Expand]](./Provider_Specific_Implementations.md)
A collection of concrete factory implementations that translate abstract architectural intents into model-specific strings, handling nuances like system message formatting and context window optimization.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.prompts.claude_prompts.ClaudePromptFactory`:395-447
- `agents.prompts.gpt_prompts.GPTPromptFactory`:467-519
- `agents.prompts.gemini_flash_prompts.GeminiFlashPromptFactory`:359-411
- `agents.prompts.deepseek_prompts.DeepSeekPromptFactory`:404-456

## Details

Defines the structural contract for all prompt generation and manages the lifecycle and selection of provider-specific factories.

### Prompt Factory Core & Orchestrator
Manages the lifecycle and global state of the active prompt factory, acting as a central registry that maps configuration settings to specific provider implementations.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.prompts.prompt_factory.PromptFactory`:49-99
- `agents.prompts.prompt_factory.initialize_global_factory`:106-111
- `agents.prompts.prompt_factory.get_prompt`:124-126

## Details

A collection of concrete factory implementations that translate abstract architectural intents into model-specific strings, handling nuances like system message formatting and context window optimization.

### Tier-1 Global Prompt Factories
Concrete implementations for industry-leading LLM providers optimized for high-complexity reasoning tasks and long-context capabilities.

- `agents.prompts.claude_prompts.ClaudePromptFactory`:395-447

## Details

Monitors system health, calculates code quality metrics (like coupling and cohesion), and tracks execution telemetry for observability.

### Code Health Engine [[Expand]](./Code_Health_Engine.md)
Performs static analysis to calculate maintainability metrics, architectural violations, and code quality scores.

```mermaid
    Architectural_Abstraction_Layer -- "forwards resolved cluster IDs to" --> Persistence_Integrity_Manager
    Expansion_Orchestrator -- "calls" --> Visual_Synthesis_Engine
    Expansion_Orchestrator -- "calls" --> Persistence_Integrity_Manager
    Architectural_Abstraction_Layer -- "calls" --> Expansion_Orchestrator
```

## Details

The core execution logic that performs depth-first or breadth-first expansion of the software architecture and synthesizes final visual representations.

### Expansion Orchestrator
Manages the iterative traversal logic of the codebase, determining which components require deeper analysis based on complexity or depth constraints.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `agents.planner_agent.get_expandable_components`:94-117

## Details

Provides a structured, filtered view of the repository's file system and manages directory traversal.

Manages the lifecycle and configuration of the repository environment, including project root identification and filtering rule initialization.

## Details

Manages the physical inspection of the file system, implements ignore logic, and generates repository state hashes for incremental analysis.

### Traversal Orchestrator & Tech Identifier
The central engine for physical repository inspection. It walks the file system to identify programming languages, maps file extensions to profiles, and categorizes the repository's technical stack using tools like Tokei.

## Details

Orchestrates the acquisition and installation of external binaries and runtimes, managing the lifecycle of LSP server installations via a manifest-driven approach.

### Analysis Context & Adapter Configurator [[Expand]](./Analysis_Context_Adapter_Configurator.md)
Bridges the gap between the installed tools and the target codebase. It applies repository-level ignore rules (e.g., .gitignore) to configure how language adapters should filter and interact with the file system.

## Details

Manages the discovery, lifecycle, and configuration of language-specific runtimes and SDKs, including version resolution and hardware-dependent parameter calculation.

### .NET Lifecycle & Resolution Manager
Manages the discovery, version resolution, and automated installation of the .NET SDK, implementing a tiered strategy for environment setup.

## Details

## Details

Fetches raw source code, documentation, and specific line ranges from the filesystem.

### Structural Discovery Engine
Maps the physical and logical organization of the project to provide a map for agents to navigate codebases.

## Details

Provides structured access to static analysis results, translating graph structures into formats consumable by LLM tools.

## Details

The core technical engine that manages LSP clients to perform symbol discovery, builds call graphs, and applies community detection (Leiden) to identify logical components.

### LSP Protocol & Language Adaptation [[Expand]](./LSP_Protocol_Language_Adaptation.md)
Manages the lifecycle of Language Servers and provides a unified interface for multi-language symbol extraction.

### Graph Construction & Symbol Resolution [[Expand]](./Graph_Construction_Symbol_Resolution.md)
Builds the global call graph by coordinating symbol discovery and resolving cross-file references.


**Related Classes/Methods**:

- `static_analyzer.engine.call_graph_builder.CallGraphBuilder`:23-302
- `static_analyzer.engine.edge_builder.build_edges_via_references`:33-122
- `static_analyzer.graph.CallGraph`:85-827
- `static_analyzer.engine.symbol_table.SymbolTable`:16-328

### Community Detection & Semantic Partitioning [[Expand]](./Community_Detection_Semantic_Partitioning.md)
Applies mathematical clustering to the call graph to identify logical modules.

### [FAQ](https://github.com/CodeBoarding/GeneratedOnBoardings/tree/main?tab=readme-ov-file#faq)

```mermaid
graph LR
    Project_Configuration_Discovery["Project Configuration Discovery"]
    Contextual_Noise_Filter["Contextual Noise Filter"]
    Structural_Data_Refiner["Structural Data Refiner"]
    Project_Configuration_Discovery -- "provides base directory and include patterns for scope definition" --> Contextual_Noise_Filter
    Contextual_Noise_Filter -- "cleans up resulting data structures from filtered files" --> Structural_Data_Refiner
    Project_Configuration_Discovery -- "informs refinement logic based on configuration settings" --> Structural_Data_Refiner
```

## Details
